title: Rigidity results on Liouville equation
summary:
We give a complete classification of solutions bounded from above of the
Liouville equation $$-\Delta u=e^{2u}\quad\mbox{in}\quad {\mathbf{R}}^2.$$ More
generally, solutions in the class $$N:=\{ u:\limsup_{z\to\infty}
u(z)/\log|z|:=k(u)<\infty\}$$ are described. As a consequence, we obtain five
rigidity results. First, $k(u)$ can take only a discrete set of values: either
$k=-2$, or $2k$ is a non-negative integer. Second, $u\to-\infty$ as
$z\to\infty$, if and only if $u$ is radial about some point. Third, if $u$ is
symmetric with respect to $x$ and $y$ axes and $u_x<0,\; u_y<0$ in the first
quadrant then $u$ is radially symmetric. Fourth, if $u$ is concave and bounded
from above, then $u$ is one-dimensional. Fifth, if $u$ is bounded from above,
and the diameter of ${\mathbf{R}}^2$ with the metric $e^{2u}\delta$ is $\pi$,
where $\delta$ is the Euclidean metric, then $u$ is either radial about a point
or one-dimensional.
  In addition, we extend the concavity rigidity result on Liouville equation in
higher dimensions.

AI.tldr: 完全分类了二维Liouville方程的有上界解，并得到五个刚性结果
AI.motivation: 研究二维Liouville方程 $-\Delta u = e^{2u}$ 在 $\mathbb{R}^2$ 上的解分类问题，特别关注有上界解和渐近行为受限制的解类 $N$
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析、对称性方法、几何测度论（通过度量 $e^{2u}\delta$ 的直径条件）、凹性分析和径向对称性技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 完全分类 $N$ 类中的解；2. $k(u)$ 只能取离散值：$k=-2$ 或 $2k$ 为非负整数；3. $u\to -\infty$ 当且仅当 $u$ 关于某点径向对称；4. 具有$x,y$轴对称性且在一象限导数负的解必径向对称；5. 凹且有上界的解必为一维；6. 有上界且度量直径为 $\pi$ 的解要么径向对称要么一维
AI.significance: 为Liouville方程提供了完整的解分类，建立了多个刚性定理，深化了对二维几何分析中这类重要方程解结构的理解，并将凹性刚性结果推广到高维

title: Singular SPDEs on Homogeneous Lie Groups
comment:
68 pages; typos fixed bibliography updated and more detail on
  construction of gPAM model reinstated
summary:
The aim of this article is to extend the scope of the theory of regularity
structures in order to deal with a large class of singular SPDEs of the form
$$\partial_t u = \mathfrak{L} u+ F(u, \xi)\ ,$$ where the differential operator
$\mathfrak{L}$ fails to be elliptic. This is achieved by interpreting the base
space $\mathbb{R}^{d}$ as a non-trivial homogeneous Lie group $\mathbb{G}$ such
that the differential operator $\partial_t -\mathfrak{L}$ becomes a translation
invariant hypoelliptic operator on $\mathbb{G}$. Prime examples are the kinetic
Fokker-Planck operator $\partial_t -\Delta_v - v\cdot \nabla_x$ and heat-type
operators associated to sub-Laplacians. As an application of the developed
framework, we solve a class of parabolic Anderson type equations $$\partial_t u
= \sum_{i} X^2_i u + u (\xi-c)$$ on the compact quotient of an arbitrary Carnot
group.

AI.tldr: 将正则结构理论扩展到处理非椭圆算子的奇异SPDE，通过将基空间解释为齐次李群，使∂t-𝔏成为平移不变亚椭圆算子。
AI.motivation: 传统正则结构理论主要处理椭圆算子驱动的奇异SPDE，本文旨在扩展该理论以处理非椭圆算子（如动能Fokker-Planck算子和次拉普拉斯算子）驱动的奇异随机偏微分方程。
AI.techniques: 将ℝ^d解释为非平凡齐次李群𝔾，使∂t-𝔏成为平移不变亚椭圆算子；利用齐次李群上的调和分析工具；扩展正则结构理论框架以适应非椭圆情形。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了处理非椭圆奇异SPDE的正则结构理论扩展框架；解决了任意Carnot群紧商上的抛物型Anderson方程∂_t u = Σ_i X_i^2 u + u(ξ-c)。
AI.significance: 显著扩展了正则结构理论的应用范围，使其能够处理一大类非椭圆奇异SPDE，为研究亚椭圆算子驱动的随机方程提供了新工具，在随机分析和几何分析领域有重要意义。

title: Maxwell's equations with hypersingularities at a negative index material   conical tip
summary:
We study a transmission problem for the time harmonic Maxwell's equations
between a classical positive material and a so-called negative index material
in which both the permittivity $\varepsilon$ and the permeability $\mu$ take
negative values. Additionally, we assume that the interface between the two
domains is smooth everywhere except at a point where it coincides locally with
a conical tip. In this context, it is known that for certain critical values of
the contrasts in $\varepsilon$ and in $\mu$, the corresponding scalar operators
are not of Fredholm type in the usual $H^1$ spaces. In this work, we show that
in these situations, the Maxwell's equations are not well-posed in the
classical $L^2$ framework due to existence of hypersingular fields which are of
infinite energy at the tip. By combining the $\mathrm{T}$-coercivity approach
and the Kondratiev theory, we explain how to construct new functional
frameworks to recover well-posedness of the Maxwell's problem. We also explain
how to select the setting which is consistent with the limiting absorption
principle. From a technical point of view, the fields as well as their curls
decompose as the sum of an explicit singular part, related to the black hole
singularities of the scalar operators, and a smooth part belonging to some
weighted spaces. The analysis we propose rely in particular on the proof of new
key results of scalar and vector potential representations of singular fields.

AI.tldr: 研究锥形界面处正负折射率材料间Maxwell方程传输问题的适定性，通过T-强制性方法和Kondratiev理论构造新的函数框架恢复适定性。
AI.motivation: 研究时间谐波Maxwell方程在正负折射率材料（ε和μ均为负值）间的传输问题，特别关注界面在锥形尖端处不光滑的情况。当介电常数和磁导率对比达到临界值时，相应的标量算子在通常的H^1空间中不是Fredholm型算子，导致经典L^2框架下Maxwell方程不适定。
AI.techniques: 结合T-强制性方法和Kondratiev理论，构造新的函数框架；使用加权空间分析；证明标量和矢量势表示奇异场的新关键结果；应用极限吸收原理选择适当的函数设置。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明在临界对比值下，Maxwell方程在经典L^2框架中不适定，存在尖端处能量无穷大的超奇异场；2. 构造新的函数框架恢复Maxwell问题的适定性；3. 场及其旋度可分解为显式奇异部分（与标量算子的黑洞奇点相关）和属于加权空间的平滑部分之和。
AI.significance: 为处理正负折射率材料界面在奇异几何（锥形尖端）处的电磁波传播问题提供了严格的数学框架，解决了经典函数空间中不适定的问题，对超材料和奇异几何中的电磁波理论有重要贡献。

title: First-order Sobolev spaces, self-similar energies and energy measures on   the Sierpi\'{n}ski carpet
comment:
167 pages 4 figures; minor updates and an improvement in Lemma 9.6 (a
  shorter version is to appear in Communications on Pure and Applied
  Mathematics)
summary:
We construct and investigate $(1, p)$-Sobolev space, $p$-energy, and the
corresponding $p$-energy measures on the planar Sierpi\'{n}ski carpet for all
$p \in (1, \infty)$. Our method is based on the idea of Kusuoka and Zhou
[Probab. Theory Related Fields $\textbf{93}$ (1992), no. 2, 169--196], where
Brownian motion (the case $p = 2$) on self-similar sets including the planar
Sierpi\'{n}ski carpet were constructed. Similar to this earlier work, we use a
sequence of discrete graph approximations and the corresponding discrete
$p$-energies to define the Sobolev space and $p$-energies. However, we need a
new approach to ensure that our $(1, p)$-Sobolev space has a dense set of
continuous functions when $p$ is less than the Ahlfors regular conformal
dimension. The new ingredients are the use of Loewner type estimates on
combinatorial modulus to obtain Poincar\'e inequality and elliptic Harnack
inequality on a sequence of approximating graphs. An important feature of our
Sobolev space is the self-similarity of our $p$-energy, which allows us to
define corresponding $p$-energy measures on the planar Sierpi\'{n}ski carpet.
We show that our Sobolev space can also be viewed as a Korevaar-Schoen type
space. We apply our results to the attainment problem for Ahlfors regular
conformal dimension of the Sierpi\'{n}ski carpet. In particular, we show that
if the Ahlfors regular conformal dimension, say $\dim_{\mathrm{ARC}}$, is
attained, then any optimal measure which attains $\dim_{\mathrm{ARC}}$ should
be comparable with the $\dim_{\mathrm{ARC}}$-energy measure of some function in
our $(1, \dim_{\mathrm{ARC}})$-Sobolev space up to a multiplicative constant.
In this case, we also prove that the Newton-Sobolev space corresponding to any
optimal measure and metric can be identified as our self-similar $(1,
\dim_{\mathrm{ARC}})$-Sobolev space.

AI.tldr: 在平面Sierpiński地毯上构造并研究了所有p∈(1,∞)的(1,p)-Sobolev空间、p-能量及相应p-能量测度。
AI.motivation: 研究分形集上的Sobolev空间理论，特别是平面Sierpiński地毯这一重要分形模型。Kusuoka和Zhou在1992年构造了自相似集上的布朗运动(p=2情况)，本文将其推广到所有p∈(1,∞)的情况。
AI.techniques: 基于离散图逼近序列和离散p-能量；使用Loewner型估计于组合模量以获得Poincaré不等式和椭圆Harnack不等式；采用Korevaar-Schoen型空间方法；利用自相似性构造p-能量测度。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了平面Sierpiński地毯上所有p∈(1,∞)的(1,p)-Sobolev空间和p-能量；2. 当p小于Ahlfors正则共形维数时，Sobolev空间具有稠密的连续函数集；3. 证明了Sobolev空间也可视为Korevaar-Schoen型空间；4. 应用于Ahlfors正则共形维数的实现问题，建立了最优测度与dim_ARC-能量测度的可比性。
AI.significance: 将分形集上的Sobolev空间理论从p=2推广到所有p>1，为分形分析提供了新工具；建立了分形几何与Sobolev空间理论的联系；为Ahlfors正则共形维数的研究提供了新视角；发展了分形集上的变分方法和能量测度理论。

title: The Cauchy problem for the logarithmic Schr\"odinger equation revisited
summary:
We revisit the Cauchy problem for the logarithmic Schr\"odinger equation and
construct strong solutions in $H^1$, the energy space, and the $H^2$-energy
space. The solutions are provided in a constructive way, which does not rely on
compactness arguments, that a sequence of approximate solutions forms a Cauchy
sequence in a complete function space and then actual convergence is shown to
be in a strong sense.

AI.tldr: 构造性地建立了对数薛定谔方程在能量空间中的强解存在性
AI.motivation: 重新研究对数薛定谔方程的柯西问题，旨在在能量空间H^1和H^2-能量空间中构造强解，避免使用紧性论证
AI.techniques: 构造性方法（非紧性论证），通过近似解序列在完备函数空间中形成柯西序列，然后证明强收敛性
AI.main_theorems: 在对数薛定谔方程的柯西问题中，在H^1能量空间和H^2-能量空间中构造了强解
AI.significance: 提供了对数薛定谔方程解存在性的构造性证明，避免了传统的紧性论证，为这类非线性薛定谔方程提供了更直接的解构造方法

title: A Common Approach to Singular Perturbation and Homogenization II:   Semilinear Elliptic Systems
summary:
We consider periodic homogenization of boundary value problems for
second-order semilinear elliptic systems in 2D of the type $$
\partial_{x_i}\left(a_{ij}^{\alpha
\beta}(x/\varepsilon)\partial_{x_j}u(x)+b_i^\alpha(x,u(x))\right)=b^\alpha(x,u(x))
\mbox{ for } x \in \Omega. $$ For small $\varepsilon>0$ we prove existence of
weak solutions $u=u_\varepsilon$ as well as their local uniqueness for
$\|u-u_0\|_\infty \approx 0$, where $u_0$ is a given non-degenerate weak
solution to the homogenized boundary value problem, and we estimate the rate of
convergence to zero of $\|u_\varepsilon-u_0\|_\infty$ for $\varepsilon \to 0$.
  Our assumptions are, roughly speaking, as follows: The functions
$a_{ij}^{\alpha \beta}$ are bounded, measurable and $\mathbb{Z}^2$-periodic,
the functions $b_i^\alpha(\cdot,u)$ and $b^\alpha(\cdot,u)$ are bounded and
measurable, the functions $b_i^\alpha(x,\cdot)$ and $b^\alpha(x,\cdot)$ are
$C^1$-smooth, and $\Omega$ is a bounded Lipschitz domain in $\mathbb{R}^2$.
Neither global solution uniqueness is supposed nor growth restrictions of
$b_i^\alpha(x,\cdot)$ or $b^\alpha(x,\cdot)$ nor higher regularity of $u_0$,
and cross-diffusion is allowed.
  The main tool of the proofs is an abstract result of implicit function
theorem type which in the past has been applied to singularly perturbed
nonlinear ODEs and elliptic and parabolic PDEs and, hence, which permits a
common approach to existence, local uniqueness and error estimates for
singularly perturbed problems and and for homogenization problems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了二维半线性椭圆系统的周期均匀化问题，证明了弱解的存在性、局部唯一性，并给出了收敛速率估计。
AI.motivation: 研究二维半线性椭圆系统的周期均匀化问题，在系数具有周期性快速振荡的情况下，分析当周期参数ε趋于0时，原问题的解与均匀化问题解之间的关系。
AI.techniques: 主要使用隐函数定理类型的抽象结果，该方法曾应用于奇异摄动非线性ODE、椭圆和抛物型PDE，为奇异摄动问题和均匀化问题提供了统一的处理框架。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于小的ε>0，弱解u_ε的存在性及其在非退化均匀化解u_0附近的局部唯一性，并给出了||u_ε-u_0||_∞趋于0时的收敛速率估计。
AI.significance: 该工作为具有周期性系数的半线性椭圆系统的均匀化理论提供了新的结果，特别是不需要全局解唯一性假设、不要求增长限制、允许交叉扩散，扩展了均匀化理论的应用范围。

title: Stability of homogeneous equilibria of the Hartree-Fock equation, for   its equivalent formulation for random fields
summary:
The Hartree-Fock equation admits homogeneous states that model infinitely
many particles at equilibrium. We prove their asymptotic stability in large
dimensions, under assumptions on the linearised operator. Perturbations are
moreover showed to scatter to linear waves. We obtain this result for the
equivalent formulation of the Hartree-Fock equation in the framework of random
fields. The main novelty is to study the full Hartree-Fock equation, including
for the first time the exchange term in the study of these stationary
solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了高维Hartree-Fock方程齐次态的渐近稳定性，首次包含了交换项的分析
AI.motivation: Hartree-Fock方程描述了多粒子系统的量子力学行为，其齐次态对应于无限多粒子在平衡状态下的模型。研究这些稳态解的稳定性对于理解量子系统的动力学行为至关重要，但以往研究通常忽略交换项，本文首次全面考虑完整的Hartree-Fock方程。
AI.techniques: 采用随机场框架重新表述Hartree-Fock方程，利用线性化算子分析，结合散射理论和渐近稳定性分析方法，处理包含交换项的完整非线性方程。
AI.main_theorems: 在高维条件下，证明了Hartree-Fock方程齐次态的渐近稳定性，并表明扰动会散射到线性波，这是首次在包含交换项的情况下获得此类稳定性结果。
AI.significance: 首次完整处理Hartree-Fock方程（包含交换项）的稳定性问题，为量子多体系统的动力学研究提供了新工具，对凝聚态物理和量子化学中的相关模型有重要理论意义。

title: $\text{L}^2$ solutions for cubic NLS equation with fractional   elliptic/hyperbolic operators on $\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$ and   $\mathbb{R}^2$
summary:
In this work we consider the Cauchy problem for the cubic Schr\"odinger
equation posed on cylinder $\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$ with fractional
derivatives $(-\partial_y^2)^{\alpha},\, \alpha >0$, in the periodic direction.
The spatial operator includes elliptic and hyperbolic regimes. We prove $L^2$
global well-posedness results when $\alpha > 1$ by proving a $L^4 - L^2$
Strichartz inequality for the linear equation, following the ideas developep by
H. Takaoka and N. Tzvetkov in the the case of the Laplacian operator. Further,
these results remain valid on the euclidean environment $\mathbb{R}^2$, so
well-posedness in $L^2$ are also achieved in this case. Our proof in the
elliptic (hyperbolic) case does not work in the case $0<\alpha <1$ ($0<\alpha
\leq 1$), respectively.

AI.tldr: 证明了圆柱体上带分数阶导数的三次薛定谔方程的L²全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究圆柱体ℝ×𝕋上带分数阶导数(-∂_y²)^α的三次薛定谔方程的柯西问题，该空间算子包含椭圆和双曲两种情形，旨在建立全局适定性理论
AI.techniques: 通过建立线性方程的L⁴-L² Strichartz不等式，采用H. Takaoka和N. Tzvetkov在拉普拉斯算子情形下的思想方法
AI.main_theorems: 当α>1时证明了L²全局适定性结果，并在椭圆和双曲情形下分别建立了相应的适定性理论，结果也适用于欧几里得环境ℝ²
AI.significance: 将分数阶薛定谔方程适定性理论推广到圆柱几何，揭示了椭圆和双曲情形的不同行为，为分数阶偏微分方程研究提供了新视角

title: Explicit formula for the Benjamin--Ono equation with square integrable   and real valued initial data and applications to the zero dispersion limit
summary:
In this paper, we extend G{\'e}rard's formula for the solution of the
Benjamin--Ono equation on the line to square integrable and real valued initial
data. Combined with this formula, we also extend the G{\'e}rard's formula for
the zero dispersion limit of the Benjamin--Ono equation on the line to more
singular initial data. In the derivation of the extension of the formula for
the zero dispersion limit, we also find an interesting integral equality, which
might be useful in other contexts.

AI.tldr: 将Benjamin-Ono方程解的Gérard公式推广到平方可积实值初值，并扩展其零色散极限公式到更奇异初值
AI.motivation: Benjamin-Ono方程是重要的可积色散波方程，Gérard公式提供了其解的显式表达式，但原公式适用范围有限，需要扩展到更一般的平方可积实值初值条件和更奇异的零色散极限情形
AI.techniques: 使用Gérard公式的扩展方法，分析平方可积函数空间的性质，处理奇异初值的极限行为，推导积分等式作为中间结果
AI.main_theorems: 1. Benjamin-Ono方程解的Gérard公式对平方可积实值初值的推广；2. 零色散极限公式对更奇异初值的扩展；3. 推导过程中发现的有趣积分等式
AI.significance: 扩展了Benjamin-Ono方程解析理论，为处理更一般的初值条件提供了工具，发现的积分等式可能在其它数学物理问题中有应用价值

title: Parameter identification in PDEs by the solution of monotone inclusion   problems
summary:
In this paper we consider the solution of monotone inverse problems using the
particular example of a parameter identification problem for a semilinear
parabolic PDE. For the regularized solution of this problem, we introduce a
total variation based regularization method requiring the solution of a
monotone inclusion problem. We show well-posedness in the sense of inverse
problems of the resulting regularization scheme. In addition, we introduce and
analyze a numerical algorithm for the solution of this inclusion problem using
a nested inertial primal dual method. We demonstrate by means of numerical
examples the convergence of both the numerical algorithm and the regularization
method.

AI.tldr: 提出基于全变差正则化的单调逆问题求解方法，针对半线性抛物型PDE参数识别问题，建立了正则化方案的适定性并设计了数值算法。
AI.motivation: 研究单调逆问题的正则化求解方法，以半线性抛物型偏微分方程的参数识别问题为具体实例，解决这类逆问题的不适定性。
AI.techniques: 全变差正则化方法、单调包含问题求解、嵌套惯性原始对偶算法、正则化理论分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了所提正则化方案在逆问题意义下的适定性；设计了嵌套惯性原始对偶算法并分析了其收敛性；通过数值实验验证了算法和正则化方法的收敛性。
AI.significance: 为单调逆问题提供了新的正则化框架和高效数值算法，在参数识别等PDE逆问题中有重要应用价值，扩展了全变差正则化在单调问题中的应用。

title: Multiple normalized solutions to a system of nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger   equations
summary:
We find a normalized solution $u=(u_1,\ldots,u_K)$ to the system of $K$
coupled nonlinear Schr\"odinger equations \begin{equation*}
  \left\{ \begin{array}{l}
  -\Delta u_i+ \lambda_i u_i =
\sum_{j=1}^K\beta_{i,j}u_i|u_i|^{p/2-2}|u_j|^{p/2} \quad \mathrm{in} \,
\mathbb{R}^3,\newline
  u_i \in H^1_{rad}(\mathbb{R}^3),\newline
  \int_{\mathbb{R}^3} |u_i|^2 \, dx = \rho_i^2 \quad \text{for }i=1,\ldots, K,
  \end{array} \right. \end{equation*} where
$\rho=(\rho_1,\ldots,\rho_K)\in(0,\infty)^K$ is prescribed, $(\lambda,u) \in
\mathbb{R}^K\times H^1(\mathbb{R}^3)^K$ are the unknown and $4\leq p<6$. In the
case of two equations we show the existence of multiple solutions provided that
the coupling is sufficiently large. We also show that for negative coupling
there are no ground state solutions. The main novelty in our approach is that
we use the Cwikel-Lieb-Rozenblum theorem in order to estimate the Morse index
of a solution as well as a Liouville-type result in an exterior domain.

AI.tldr: 研究K个耦合非线性薛定谔方程系统在质量约束下的归一化解存在性，特别关注大耦合参数下的多解存在性和负耦合下的无基态解
AI.motivation: 研究耦合非线性薛定谔方程系统在质量约束下的归一化解存在性问题，这类系统在玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚、非线性光学等物理现象中有重要应用，特别关注耦合参数对解的存在性和多重性的影响
AI.techniques: 使用Cwikel-Lieb-Rozenblum定理估计解的Morse指标，采用外部区域上的Liouville型结果，变分方法结合约束优化，径向对称性假设简化问题
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于两个方程的情况，当耦合参数充分大时存在多个归一化解；2. 对于负耦合参数，不存在基态解；3. 在质量约束下建立解的存在性理论框架
AI.significance: 为耦合非线性薛定谔方程系统的归一化解理论提供了新的分析方法，特别是将Cwikel-Lieb-Rozenblum定理应用于Morse指标估计的创新性使用，对理解多组分玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚的稳定性有重要意义

title: Perron solutions and boundary regularity for nonlocal nonlinear   Dirichlet problems
summary:
For nonlinear operators of fractional $p$-Laplace type, we consider two types
of solutions to the nonlocal Dirichlet problem: Sobolev solutions based on
fractional Sobolev spaces and Perron solutions based on superharmonic
functions. These solutions give rise to two different concepts of regularity
for boundary points, namely Sobolev and Perron regularity. We show that these
two notions are equivalent and we also provide several characterizations of
regular boundary points. Along the way, we give a new definition of Perron
solutions, which is applicable to arbitrary exterior Dirichlet data $g:
\Omega^c \to [-\infty,\infty]$. We obtain resolutivity results for these Perron
solutions, and show that the Sobolev and Perron solutions coincide for a large
class of exterior Dirichlet data. This also implies invariance of the Perron
solutions under perturbations on sets of zero fractional capacity. A uniqueness
result for the Dirichlet problem is also obtained for the class of bounded
solutions taking prescribed continuous exterior data quasieverywhere on the
boundary.

AI.tldr: 证明了分数阶p-Laplace型算子的Sobolev正则性和Perron正则性的等价性，并给出了边界点正则性的多种刻画。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶p-Laplace型算子的非局部Dirichlet问题，比较基于分数阶Sobolev空间的Sobolev解和基于超调和函数的Perron解这两种不同解概念，探讨它们对应的边界点正则性理论。
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶Sobolev空间理论、分数阶容量理论、Perron方法、超调和函数理论、位势理论，以及新的Perron解定义方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1) Sobolev正则性和Perron正则性等价；2) 边界点正则性的多种刻画；3) 新的Perron解定义适用于任意外部Dirichlet数据；4) Perron解的可解性结果；5) Sobolev解和Perron解对一大类外部数据重合；6) Perron解在零分数容量集扰动下的不变性；7) 有界解在边界拟处处取连续外部数据时的唯一性。
AI.significance: 建立了分数阶p-Laplace型算子正则性理论的统一框架，将经典位势理论中的Perron方法推广到非局部情形，为研究非局部椭圆算子的边界行为提供了理论基础。

title: On the equivalence between an Onofri-type inequality by Del   Pino-Dolbeault and the sharp logarithmic Moser-Trudinger inequality
summary:
In this paper we consider the $N$-dimensional Euclidean Onofri inequality
proved by del Pino and Dolbeault for smooth compactly supported functions in
$\mathbb{R}^N$, $N \geq 2$. We extend the inequality to a suitable weighted
Sobolev space, although no clear connection with standard Sobolev spaces on
$\mathbb{S}^N$ through stereographic projection is present, except for the
planar case. Moreover, in any dimension $N \geq 2$, we show that the Euclidean
Onofri inequality is equivalent to the logarithmic Moser-Trudinger inequality
with sharp constant proved by Carleson and Chang for balls in $\mathbb{R}^N$.

AI.tldr: 将欧几里得Onofri不等式扩展到加权Sobolev空间，并证明其与Carleson-Chang的尖锐常数对数Moser-Trudinger不等式等价
AI.motivation: 研究N维欧几里得空间中的Onofri不等式，该不等式最初由del Pino和Dolbeault证明，但仅限于光滑紧支函数。需要将其扩展到更一般的函数空间，并探索其与其他重要不等式的关系。
AI.techniques: 加权Sobolev空间理论、立体投影变换（在平面情况下）、不等式等价性证明、极值函数分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将欧几里得Onofri不等式扩展到加权Sobolev空间；2. 证明对于N≥2维，欧几里得Onofri不等式与Carleson-Chang的尖锐常数对数Moser-Trudinger不等式等价
AI.significance: 建立了两个重要不等式之间的等价关系，深化了对Moser-Trudinger型不等式的理解，为分析几何和偏微分方程中的极值问题提供了新的联系

title: Interaction between initial behavior of temperature and the mean   curvature of the interface in two-phase heat conductors
comment:
The revised version 2 has 19 pages (3 pages shorter than the previous
  one) and it deals with the parabolic problem directly without use of the
  Laplace-Stieljes transform and a Tauberian theorem. The main theorem (Theorem
  1.1) becomes much better than that in the previous version. In the revised
  version 3, Introduction is improved but results are not changed
summary:
We consider the Cauchy problem for the heat diffusion equation in the whole
Euclidean space consisting of two media locally with different constant
conductivities, where initially one medium has temperature 0 and the other has
temperature 1. Under the assumption that a part of the interface between two
media with different constant conductivities is of class $C^2$ in a
neighborhood of a point $x$ on it, we extract the mean curvature of the
interface at $x$ from the initial behavior of temperature at $x$. This result
is purely local in space. As a corollary, when the whole Euclidean space
consists of two media globally with different constant conductivities, it is
shown that if a connected component $\Gamma$ of the interface is of class $C^2$
and is stationary isothermic, then the mean curvature of $\Gamma$ must be
constant. Moreover, we apply this result to some overdetermined problems for
two-phase heat conductors and obtain some symmetry theorems which relax
considerably the regularity assumptions of some previous results.

AI.tldr: 通过热扩散方程初值问题的局部分析，从界面处温度的初始行为提取界面平均曲率，并应用于两相热导体的过定问题。
AI.motivation: 研究具有不同常数导热系数的两相介质中热扩散方程的Cauchy问题，旨在从温度场的局部行为提取界面的几何信息（平均曲率），并应用于过定问题和对称性分析。
AI.techniques: 使用局部坐标变换、渐近展开、奇异性分析，结合热传导方程的正则性理论和界面条件，通过温度场的初始行为提取几何信息。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在界面C²正则性假设下，从温度在界面点的初始行为可提取该点的平均曲率；2. 若连通界面分量是C²类且是平稳等温的，则其平均曲率必为常数；3. 应用该结果得到两相热导体过定问题的对称性定理，放宽了先前结果的正则性要求。
AI.significance: 建立了热传导问题与界面几何之间的深刻联系，为通过物理场反演几何信息提供了新方法，显著改进了两相热导体对称性问题的正则性条件，具有理论和应用价值。

title: Quantitative bounds for bounded solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations   in endpoint critical Besov spaces
summary:
In this paper, we study the quantitative regularity and blowup criteria for
classical solutions to the three-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes
equations in a critical Besov space framework. Specifically, we consider
solutions $u\in L^\infty_t(\dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{-1+\frac{3}{p}})$ such that
$|D|^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}|u|\in L^\infty_t (L^p)$ with $3<p<\infty$. By deriving
refined regularity estimates and substantially improving the strategy in
\cite{Tao_20}, we overcome difficulties stemming from the low regularity of the
Besov spaces and establish quantitative bounds for such solutions. These bounds
are expressed in terms of a triple exponential of $\| u
(t)\|_{\dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}}$ combined with a single exponential
of $\bigl\| |D|^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}|u(t)| \bigr\|_{L^p}$. Consequently, we obtain
a new blowup rate which can be interpreted as a coupling of triple logarithm of
$\| u(t) \|_{\dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}}$ and a single logarithm of
$\bigl\| |D|^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}|u(t)| \bigr\|_{L^p}$.

AI.tldr: 该论文在临界Besov空间框架下，建立了三维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程经典解的定量正则性估计和爆破准则。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程在临界Besov空间中的定量正则性和爆破准则，这是流体力学中关于解的存在性和奇异性的核心问题。作者关注解在空间$u\in L^\infty_t(\dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{-1+\frac{3}{p}})$且满足$|D|^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}|u|\in L^\infty_t (L^p)$（$3<p<\infty$）的情形，旨在克服Besov空间低正则性带来的困难。
AI.techniques: 采用临界Besov空间框架，改进了Tao (2020)的策略，推导了精细的正则性估计。主要技术包括处理低正则性Besov空间的困难，建立定量边界估计，以及将解范数表示为三重指数和单指数组合的形式。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了经典解的定量正则性边界，这些边界由$\| u(t)\|_{\dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}}$的三重指数和$\bigl\| |D|^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}|u(t)| \bigr\|_{L^p}$的单指数组合表示。由此得到了新的爆破率，可以解释为$\| u(t) \|_{\dot{B}_{p,\infty}^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}}$的三重对数和$\bigl\| |D|^{-1+\frac{3}{p}}|u(t)| \bigr\|_{L^p}$的单对数的耦合。
AI.significance: 该工作显著推进了Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间中的正则性理论，提供了更精细的爆破准则。通过克服低正则性Besov空间的困难，建立了定量估计，这对理解流体方程解的奇异性行为有重要意义，并为后续研究提供了新的分析框架。

title: Existence of weak solutions for fast diffusion equation with a   divergence type of drift term
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2306.08237
summary:
We construct non-negative weak solutions of fast diffusion equations with a
divergence type of drift term satisfying the $L^q$-energy inequality and speed
estimate in Wasserstein spaces under some integrability conditions on the drift
term. Furthermore, in the case that the drift term has a divergence-free
structure, it turns out that its integrability conditions can be relaxed, which
is also applicable to porous medium equations, thereby improving previous
results. As an application, the existence of weak solutions is also discussed
for a viscous Boussinesq system of the fast diffusion type.

AI.tldr: 构造具有散度型漂移项的快速扩散方程非负弱解，在漂移项满足可积性条件下建立L^q能量不等式和Wasserstein空间中的速度估计。
AI.motivation: 研究具有散度型漂移项的快速扩散方程，这类方程出现在流体力学和传热问题中，特别是与Boussinesq系统相关的应用。需要处理漂移项的可积性条件对解存在性和正则性的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用Wasserstein空间中的最优输运理论，建立L^q能量不等式，处理散度型漂移项的特殊结构，对散度自由情况采用更弱的可积性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在漂移项满足一定可积性条件下，构造快速扩散方程的非负弱解，满足L^q能量不等式和Wasserstein速度估计；2. 当漂移项具有散度自由结构时，可积性条件可以放宽，该结果也适用于多孔介质方程；3. 将结果应用于快速扩散型粘性Boussinesq系统的弱解存在性。
AI.significance: 改进了先前关于具有漂移项的快速扩散方程的结果，特别是对散度自由漂移项给出了更优的可积性条件，为处理Boussinesq系统等流体力学问题提供了新的理论工具。

title: Anderson localized states for the nonlinear Maryland model on   $\mathbb{Z}^d$
summary:
In this paper, we investigate Anderson localization for a nonlinear
perturbation of the Maryland model
$H=\varepsilon\Delta+\cot\pi(\theta+j\cdot\alpha)\delta_{j,j'}$ on
$\mathbb{Z}^d$. Specifically, if $\varepsilon,\delta$ are sufficiently small,
we construct a large number of time quasi-periodic and space exponentially
decaying solutions (i.e., Anderson localized states) for the equation
$i\frac{\partial u}{\partial t}=Hu+\delta|u|^{2p}u$ with a Diophantine
$\alpha$. Our proof combines eigenvalue estimates of the Maryland model with
the Craig-Wayne-Bourgain method, which originates from KAM theory for
Hamiltonian PDEs.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性扰动Maryland模型在充分小参数下存在大量时间拟周期、空间指数衰减的Anderson局域态
AI.motivation: 研究非线性扰动下Maryland模型的Anderson局域化现象，该模型是准周期势场中的典型模型，结合了离散Laplacian和cotangent势函数
AI.techniques: 结合Maryland模型的特征值估计与Craig-Wayne-Bourgain方法（源自Hamiltonian PDEs的KAM理论）
AI.main_theorems: 当ε,δ充分小时，对Diophantine频率α，构造了大量时间拟周期且空间指数衰减的Anderson局域态解
AI.significance: 将Anderson局域化理论扩展到非线性扰动情形，为非线性Schrödinger方程中准周期势场下的局域化现象提供了严格数学基础

title: Global second order optimal regularity for the vectorial $p$-Laplacian
summary:
We obtain optimal regularity results for solutions to vectorial $p$-Laplace
equations $$ -{\boldsymbol \Delta}_p{\boldsymbol u}=-\operatorname{\bf
div}(|D{\boldsymbol u}|^{p-2}D{\boldsymbol u}) = {\boldsymbol f}(x)\,\, \mbox{
in $\Omega$}\,.$$ More precisely we address the issue of global second order
estimates for the stress field.

AI.tldr: 建立了向量p-Laplace方程应力场的全局二阶最优正则性估计
AI.motivation: 向量p-Laplace方程在非线性弹性、非牛顿流体力学等领域有重要应用，其解的正则性分析是PDE理论中的基本问题。应力场$|D\boldsymbol u|^{p-2}D\boldsymbol u$的正则性研究对于理解方程性质至关重要。
AI.techniques: 可能涉及非线性椭圆正则性理论、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser方法、p-Laplace算子的单调性结构、应力场的微分恒等式、全局估计的边界处理技术等
AI.main_theorems: 证明了向量p-Laplace方程应力场$|D\boldsymbol u|^{p-2}D\boldsymbol u$的全局二阶导数估计，即应力场在适当空间中的正则性结果，这比解本身的正则性更强
AI.significance: 这是p-Laplace方程正则性理论的重要进展，应力场的二阶估计为研究非线性椭圆系统的解结构提供了新工具，对非线性弹性、非牛顿流体等应用领域有理论意义

title: Sufficient Conditions for the Energy Balance for the Stochastic   Incompressible Euler Equations with Additive Noise in two Space Dimensions
summary:
We consider vanishing viscosity approximations to solutions of the stochastic
incompressible Euler equations in two space dimensions with additive noise. We
identify sufficient and necessary conditions under which martingale solutions
of the stochastic Euler equations satisfy an exact energy balance in mean. We
find that the tightness of the laws of the approximating sequence of solutions
of the stochastic Navier-Stokes equations in $L^2([0,T]\times D)$ is equivalent
to the limiting martingale solution satisfying an energy balance in mean.
Numerical simulations illustrate the theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 建立了随机不可压缩欧拉方程粘性逼近解满足精确能量平衡的充要条件
AI.motivation: 研究二维空间中带加性噪声的随机不可压缩欧拉方程，通过粘性逼近方法分析解的能量平衡性质，特别是极限解是否满足精确的能量平衡条件。
AI.techniques: 使用粘性逼近方法、鞅解理论、随机Navier-Stokes方程解的紧性分析、概率测度收敛理论，以及数值模拟验证。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 给出了随机欧拉方程鞅解满足精确能量平衡的充要条件；2. 证明了随机Navier-Stokes方程逼近解序列在L^2空间中的紧性等价于极限鞅解满足能量平衡。
AI.significance: 为随机流体力学方程的能量平衡理论提供了严格数学基础，建立了粘性逼近与能量守恒之间的深刻联系，对理解湍流中的能量耗散机制有重要意义。

title: Entire solutions to a quasilinear purely critical competitive system
summary:
We establish the existence of a fully nontrivial solution with nonnegative
components for a weakly coupled competitive system for the $p$-Laplacian in
$\mathbb{R}^N$ whose nonlinear terms are purely critical.
  We also show that the purely critical equation for the $p$-Laplacian in
$\mathbb{R}^N$ has infinitely many nodal solutions.

AI.tldr: 建立了p-Laplacian在ℝ^N中纯临界非线性项的弱耦合竞争系统存在非负分量的完全非平凡解，并证明了纯临界p-Laplacian方程存在无穷多结点解
AI.motivation: 研究p-Laplacian算子在ℝ^N中的弱耦合竞争系统，特别是非线性项为纯临界情形下的解存在性问题，这类问题在变分法和椭圆型偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、临界点理论、对称性分析，可能涉及Nehari流形、集中紧性原理、山路引理等工具来处理纯临界非线性项和ℝ^N上的无界区域问题
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弱耦合竞争p-Laplacian系统存在具有非负分量的完全非平凡解；2. 纯临界p-Laplacian方程存在无穷多个结点解（符号变化的解）
AI.significance: 扩展了临界指数非线性椭圆方程理论，为p-Laplacian算子的临界情形提供了新的存在性结果，对理解竞争系统的解结构和多解性有重要理论价值

title: The H\"{o}lder regularity of div-curl system with anisotropic   coefficients
summary:
This research examines the regularity of weak solutions to the Div-Curl
system with low regularity anisotropic coefficients. The H\"older regularity of
the Div-Curl system with one anisotropic coefficient was an unresolved problem
raised by Yin in 2016. We have addressed the open problem, and the findings
extend to the scenario involving two anisotropic coefficients. We establish the
H\"{o}lder regularity of the solution when the coefficients is H\"{o}lder
continuous. Moreover, the degree of H\"{o}lder regularity of the solution can
be improved if the coefficient has a greater degree of H\"{o}lder regularity.

AI.tldr: 解决了Yin在2016年提出的关于具有低正则性各向异性系数的Div-Curl系统Hölder正则性的未解决问题
AI.motivation: 研究具有低正则性各向异性系数的Div-Curl系统弱解的正则性，特别是Yin在2016年提出的关于一个各向异性系数的Hölder正则性未解决问题
AI.techniques: 针对各向异性系数的正则性分析，可能涉及调和分析、奇异积分理论、各向异性函数空间理论，以及处理低正则性系数的正则化技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当系数Hölder连续时，建立了解的Hölder正则性；2. 当系数具有更高阶Hölder正则性时，解的正则性可以相应提升；3. 结果从一个各向异性系数推广到两个各向异性系数的情况
AI.significance: 解决了该领域的一个重要公开问题，为具有各向异性系数的偏微分方程正则性理论提供了新结果，对电磁学、流体力学等相关物理模型有理论意义

title: The curve-lengthening flow in inversive geometry
summary:
We consider an invariant gradient flow for the invariant length functional
for co-compact curves in inversive geometry, and prove that solutions exist for
all time and converge to loxodromic curves, provided the initial curve is
admissible (so that the invariant length element is well defined).

AI.tldr: 证明了反演几何中紧余曲线不变长度泛函的梯度流解全局存在且收敛到斜驶曲线
AI.motivation: 研究反演几何中紧余曲线的不变长度泛函的梯度流，解决该几何框架下曲线演化的存在性和收敛性问题
AI.techniques: 不变几何中的梯度流方法、反演几何框架、紧余曲线的分析、不变长度泛函的变分分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于可容许初始曲线，不变长度泛函的梯度流解全局存在且收敛到斜驶曲线
AI.significance: 为反演几何中的曲线演化提供了理论基础，建立了不变几何框架下梯度流的收敛性结果

title: The defocusing Calogero--Moser derivative nonlinear Schr{\"o}dinger   equation with a nonvanishing condition at infinity
summary:
We consider the defocusing Calogero--Moser derivative nonlinear
Schr{\"o}dinger equation\begin{align*}i \partial_{t} u+\partial_{x}^2 u-2\Pi
D\left(|u|^{2}\right)u=0, \quad (t,x ) \in \mathbb{R} \times
\mathbb{R}\end{align*}posed on $E := \left\{u \in L^{\infty}(\mathbb{R}): u'
\in L^{2}(\mathbb{R}), u'' \in L^{2}(\mathbb{R}), |u|^{2}-1 \in
L^{2}(\mathbb{R})\right\}$. We prove the global well-posedness of this equation
in $E$. Moreover, we give an explicit formula for the chiral solution to this
equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了Calogero-Moser导数非线性薛定谔方程在特定函数空间E上的全局适定性，并给出了手性解的显式公式。
AI.motivation: 研究Calogero-Moser导数非线性薛定谔方程的适定性问题，该方程是带有导数非线性项的特殊薛定谔方程，具有物理和数学意义。
AI.techniques: 可能使用能量方法、守恒律分析、变换技巧以及Calogero-Moser系统的可积性结构来建立全局适定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在函数空间E上的全局适定性定理；2. 手性解的显式公式。
AI.significance: 扩展了导数非线性薛定谔方程理论，为Calogero-Moser系统提供了严格的数学基础，并揭示了其特殊解的结构。

title: A Note on Moving Frames along Sobolev Maps and the Regularity of Weakly   Harmonic Maps
summary:
The purpose of this note is twofold. First we show that, for weakly
differentiable maps between Riemannian manifolds of any dimension, a smallness
condition on a Morrey-norm of the gradient is sufficient to guarantee that the
pulled-back tangent bundle is trivialised by a finite-energy frame over simply
connected regions in the domain. This is achieved via new structure equations
for a connection introduced by Rivi\`ere in the study of weakly harmonic maps,
combined with Coulomb-frame methods and the Hardy-BMO duality of
Fefferman-Stein. We also prove that for weakly harmonic maps from domains of
any dimension into closed homogeneous targets, a smallness condition on the BMO
seminorm of the map is sufficient to obtain full regularity.

AI.tldr: 证明了弱可微映射在Morrey范数小条件下，拉回切丛可由有限能量标架平凡化，并建立了弱调和映射在BMO半范数小条件下的完全正则性。
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼流形间弱可微映射的正则性问题，特别是弱调和映射的正则性理论，这是几何分析中的核心问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Rivière引入的连接的结构方程、Coulomb标架方法、Fefferman-Stein的Hardy-BMO对偶性，以及Morrey空间和BMO空间的精细分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弱可微映射梯度Morrey范数小条件下，拉回切丛在单连通区域上可由有限能量标架平凡化；2. 弱调和映射在BMO半范数小条件下具有完全正则性。
AI.significance: 推广了调和映射正则性理论，建立了新的小性条件判据，为几何分析中弱解的正则性研究提供了新工具和视角。

title: Stable and Minimizing Cones in the Alt-Phillips Problem
summary:
We study homogeneous solutions to the Alt-Phillips problem when the exponent
$\gamma$ is close to 1.
  In dimension $d\ge3$, we show that the radial cone is minimizing when
$\gamma$ is close to 1.
  In dimension $d \ge 4$, we construct an axially symmetric cone whose contact
set has with positive density. We show that it is a global minimizer. It is
analogous to the De Silva-Jerison \cite{DJ} cone for the Alt-Caffarelli
functional which corresponds to exponent $\gamma=0$. The cone we construct
bifurcates from another minimizing cone whose contact set has zero density,
obtained as the trivial extension of the radial solution. This second cone is
analogous to a quadratic polynomial solution in the classical obstacle problem
which corresponds to exponent $\gamma=1$. In particular our results show that,
when $\gamma<1$ is sufficiently close to 1, there are axis symmetric cones that
exhibit the properties of both end point cases $\gamma=0$ and $\gamma=1$.

AI.tldr: 研究Alt-Phillips问题在γ接近1时的齐次解，发现当γ接近1时径向锥是最优的，并构造了具有正密度接触集的轴对称锥作为全局极小值。
AI.motivation: 研究Alt-Phillips问题中参数γ接近1时的齐次解行为，该问题连接了γ=0的Alt-Caffarelli泛函和γ=1的经典障碍问题两个极端情况。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、锥构造技术、分岔分析、轴对称解构造、密度分析等，特别关注接触集的正密度性质。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在d≥3维中，当γ接近1时径向锥是最优的；2. 在d≥4维中，构造了具有正密度接触集的轴对称锥，证明其为全局极小值；3. 该锥从具有零密度接触集的径向解分岔而来。
AI.significance: 建立了Alt-Phillips问题在γ接近1时的解结构，揭示了参数γ变化时解的性质如何从γ=0的Alt-Caffarelli情形过渡到γ=1的经典障碍问题情形。

title: Normalized solutions to lower critical Choquard equation in   mass-supercritical setting
summary:
We study the normalized solutions to the following Choquard equation
  \begin{equation*}
  \aligned &-\Delta u + \lambda u =\mu g(u) + \gamma (I_\alpha *
|u|^{\frac{N+\alpha}{N}})|u|^{\frac{N+\alpha}{N}-2}u & \text{in\ \ }
\mathbb{R}^N \endaligned
  \end{equation*} under the $L^2$-norm constraint $\|u\|_2=c$. Here $\gamma>0$,
$ N\geq 1$, $\alpha\in(0,N)$, $I_{\alpha}$ is the Riesz potential, and the
unknown $\lambda$ appears as a Lagrange multiplier. In a mass supercritical
setting on $g$, we find regions in the $(c,\mu)$--parameter space such that the
corresponding equation admits a positive radial ground state solution. To
overcome the lack of compactness resulting from the nonlocal term, we present a
novel compactness lemma and some prior energy estimate. These results are even
new for the power type nonlinearity $g(u)= |u|^{q-2}u$ with
$2+\frac{4}{N}<q<2^*$ ($2^*:=\frac{2N}{N-2}$, if $N\geq 3$ and $2^* = \infty$,
if $N=1, 2$). We also show that as $\mu$ or $c$ tends to $0$ (resp. $\mu$ or
$c$ tends to $+\infty$), after a suitable rescaling the ground state solutions
converge in $H^1(\RN)$ to a particular solution of the limit equations.
Further, we study the non-existence and multiplicity of positive radial
solutions to \begin{equation*}
  -\Delta u + u = \eta |u|^{q-2}u + (I_\alpha *
|u|^{\frac{N+\alpha}{N}})|u|^{\frac{N+\alpha}{N}-2}u, \quad \text{in}\ \ \RN
\end{equation*} where $N \geq 1$, $ 2< q<2^*$ and $\eta>0$. Based on some
analytical ideas the limit behaviors of the normalized solutions, we verify
some threshold regions of $\eta$ such that the corresponding equation has no
positive least action solution or admits multiple positive solutions. To the
best of our knowledge, this seems to be the first result concerning the
non-existence and multiplicity of positive solutions to Choquard type equations
involving the lower critical exponent.

AI.tldr: 研究带L²范数约束的Choquard方程归一化解的存在性、非存在性和多重性，特别关注下临界指数情形
AI.motivation: 研究带L²范数约束的Choquard方程归一化解问题，该方程包含Riesz势非局部项和质量超临界非线性项。主要动机是克服非局部项导致的紧性缺失，探索参数空间中解的存在性、非存在性和多重性，特别关注下临界指数情形。
AI.techniques: 提出新的紧性引理和先验能量估计来克服非局部项导致的紧性缺失；使用变分方法、缩放分析、极限行为分析；基于解析思想验证阈值区域
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在(c,μ)参数空间中找到区域使得方程存在正径向基态解；2. 当μ或c趋于0或+∞时，基态解经过适当缩放收敛到极限方程的特解；3. 对含下临界指数的Choquard方程，验证η的阈值区域使得方程无正最小作用解或存在多重正解
AI.significance: 首次研究了涉及下临界指数的Choquard型方程正解的非存在性和多重性；提出的新紧性引理和能量估计方法对处理非局部问题有重要意义；结果对幂型非线性情形也是新的，扩展了Choquard方程归一化解理论

title: Existence of Viscosity Solutions to Abstract Cauchy Problems via   Nonlinear Semigroups
summary:
In this work, we provide conditions for nonlinear monotone semigroups on
locally convex vector lattices to give rise to a generalized notion of
viscosity solutions to a related nonlinear partial differential equation. The
semigroup needs to satisfy a convexity estimate, so called $K$-convexity,
w.r.t. another family of operators, defined on a potentially larger locally
convex vector lattice. We then show that, under mild continuity requirements on
the bounding family of operators, the semigroup yields viscosity solutions to
the abstract Cauchy problem given in terms of its generator in the larger
locally convex vector lattice. We apply our results to drift control problems
for infinite-dimensional L\'evy processes and robust optimal control problems
for infinite-dimensional Ornstein-Uhlenbeck processes.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了单调非线性半群与抽象柯西问题粘性解之间的对应关系，并应用于无限维控制问题
AI.motivation: 研究非线性单调半群与偏微分方程粘性解之间的关系，特别是在无限维空间中的控制问题，需要建立更一般的理论框架来处理抽象柯西问题
AI.techniques: 使用局部凸向量格理论，引入K-凸性估计，结合单调算子理论和粘性解方法，在无限维空间中建立半群与PDE解的联系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在K-凸性和温和连续性条件下，非线性单调半群产生抽象柯西问题的广义粘性解，并将结果应用于无限维Lévy过程和Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程的控制问题
AI.significance: 为无限维随机控制问题提供了统一的粘性解理论框架，扩展了有限维粘性解理论到更一般的局部凸向量格空间，具有重要的理论意义和应用价值
